body_preview: Add a staleness warning to the YOUR TRAJECTORY block when the snapshot was computed more than one session ago, so the planner and implementation agents know when trajectory evidence may be stale. Why this matters: The assessment explicitly notes: "Trajectory warnings lag reality — the snapshot is computed at session start from audit-log, so it's always one s
expected_evidence: Future planning agents can cross-reference trajectory pressure with freshness to decide whether to act on a claim or defer until next session. The assessment's "Trajectory warnings lag reality" finding is partially addressed — not by eliminating lag (impossible without live audit-log), but by making it visible. title: Add trajectory freshness indicator to extract_trajectory.py
